stemHtml:
Complete the following statement:

An Air Traffic Control Unit…

options.a: May require to change the call sign for safety reasons when there is a risk of confusion between two or more similar call signs providing the aircraft is on a repetitive flight plan.
options.b: May instruct an aircraft to temporarily change its call sign for safety reasons when there is a risk of confusion between two or more similar call signs.
options.c: May not ask an aircraft to change its call sign after accepting the flight plan.
options.d: Must not ask an aircraft to change its call sign.
